description_long: This object is a whimsical, gold-colored candelabrum with three white candles, each set in a decorative holder. The central candle is taller and features a sculpted face with expressive eyes and a smiling mouth, giving the piece a lively, animated character. The two side candles are shorter and slightly angled outward, each with a visible wick and some wax drips, adding to the realistic effect. The base is ornate, with embossed patterns and a broad, stable footprint, suggesting a classic, elegant style. The arms of the candelabrum are gently curved, connecting the side holders to the central stem. The overall design is reminiscent of a character from a fairy tale, making it both functional and decorative.
description: A gold candelabrum with three white candles, the central one featuring a sculpted face and ornate base. The side candles are shorter, angled outward, and show visible wax drips.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall central candle and one angled side candle, highlighting the ornate gold base and curved arm.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all three candles, with the central candle's face clearly visible and both side candles angled outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the central candle and the other side candle, again showing the detailed base and arm.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of all three candles and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms and holders.
